name: season projected stats wired into result-equivalence
description: Promotes a projected fixture into the result-equivalence harness so the projected path has at least one baselined fixture. Coverage gap (f).
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "tfe8bc3231f8cad3ddc2080cbe07c5716"."ra" AS "season_projected_rush_atts_0", "t169612f2f9c5b165df17cc54ec1639d9"."pts_added" AS "season_projected_points_added_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "projections_index" as "tfe8bc3231f8cad3ddc2080cbe07c5716" on "tfe8bc3231f8cad3ddc2080cbe07c5716"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "tfe8bc3231f8cad3ddc2080cbe07c5716"."year" = 2024 and "tfe8bc3231f8cad3ddc2080cbe07c5716"."week" = '0' and "tfe8bc3231f8cad3ddc2080cbe07c5716"."sourceid" = 18 and "tfe8bc3231f8cad3ddc2080cbe07c5716"."seas_type" = 'REG' left join "league_format_player_projection_values" as "t169612f2f9c5b165df17cc54ec1639d9" on "t169612f2f9c5b165df17cc54ec1639d9"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t169612f2f9c5b165df17cc54ec1639d9"."year" = 2024 and "t169612f2f9c5b165df17cc54ec1639d9"."week" = '0' and "t169612f2f9c5b165df17cc54ec1639d9"."league_format_hash" = 'a54416be9596b2a3dbdac2c5fd40d0bea908cd74b84e16416713bbaf45c6bfc5' group by player.fname, player.lname, "tfe8bc3231f8cad3ddc2080cbe07c5716"."ra", "t169612f2f9c5b165df17cc54ec1639d9"."pts_added", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
